productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boy's Kay Blue Infant Kidswear
description: CompositionTeal blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with ribbed blue crew neck, raglan sleeves and graphic print on chestFittingRegular  Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Get ready to take your little boy on the adventure of his life with this blue tee from gini and jony. The "Pacific Ocean Expedition" lettering on the chest greatly appeals to the tiny adventurer in him. Team this with denim shorts and comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with his small buddies, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on his skin and keeps him fresh and comfortable all day.
